_comment: Informal descriptions for WaniKani radical components not found in kanjidic2. Edited with references to Wiktionary and the Outlier Kanji Dictionary.
L: L-shaped stroke; used in 県 (prefecture); also 以 (by means of), 断 (severance), 似 (becoming)
⺌: variant of 小 (little); used in 半 (half); also 光 (ray), 当 (hit), 消 (extinguish)
⻌: walk radical; used in 週 (week); also 道 (road-way), 近 (near), 通 (traffic), 遠 (distant), 送 (escort), 進 (advance), 運 (carry)
⺤: top variant of hand (giving) component 爪 (claw); used in 受 (accept); also 菜 (vegetable), 愛 (love), 採 (pick), 浮 (floating)
⿱丅耳: left component of 敢 (daring), originally a hand holding a spear; also in 厳 (stern)
⿰丨亖: variant of 石 (stone) in 段 (grade) and 'hand pressing down' component in 印 (stamp); also in 興 (entertain), 暇 (spare time), 鍛 (forge)
⿱丷八: exploded-x component 丷八 used in 率 (ratio); also 塁 (bases), 渋 (hesitate), 摂 (surrogate)
⿱十目: 十 (ten)目 (eye), used in 真 (true); also in 盾 (shield), 循 (sequential)
⿱爫𠙻: sound component of 揺 (swing); also in 謡 (song), 遥 (far off)
⿸⿱丿𠄌⿺乀丿: several people component used in 旅 (trip), 'water branching off a river' component in 派 (faction); also in 脈 (vein), 衆 (masses)
⿸广廿: variant of 石 (stone) used in 度 (degrees); also in 席 (seat), 渡 (transit), 庶 (commoner), 遮 (intercept)
⿺㇉一: 'old man's cane' component in 考 (consider); also in 写 (copy), 与 (bestow), 拷 (torture)
ト: katakana TO; used in 上 (above); also 下 (below), 外 (outside), 掛 (hang)
ナ: katakana NA; used in 右 (right); also 左 (left), 友 (friend), 有 (possess), 希 (hope)
ネ: katakana NE; used in 社 (company); also 礼 (salute), 神 (gods), 福 (blessing), 祝 (celebrate)
ハ: katakana HA; used in 八 (eight); also 六 (six), 分 (part), 公 (public), 谷 (valley)
ホ: katakana HO; used in 茶 (tea); also 術 (art), 述 (mention)
マ: katakana MA; used in 通 (traffic); also 予 (beforehand), 疑 (doubt), 痛 (pain)
ム: katakana MU; used in 台 (pedestal); also 広 (wide), 室 (room), 強 (strong), 公 (public)
メ: katakana ME; used in 気 (spirit); also 図 (map), 区 (ward), 便 (convenience)
ユ: katakana YU; used in 決 (decide); also 候 (climate), 快 (cheerful)
ヨ: katakana YO; used in 曜 (weekday); also 当 (hit), 雪 (snow), 事 (matter), 急 (hurry)
ｲ: top variant of 人 (person); used in 休 (rest); also 花 (flower), 何 (what), 体 (body), 作 (make), 代 (substitute), 使 (use)
㑒: sound component of 験 (verification); also in 険 (precipitous), 検 (examination), 剣 (sabre), 倹 (frugal)
㠯: sitting buttocks, form component of 官 (bureaucrat); also in 追 (chase), 館 (building), 管 (pipe), 師 (expert)
㦮: sound component of 残 (remainder); also in 浅 (shallow), 銭 (coin), 践 (tread), 桟 (scaffold)
丆: small 厂 (cliff radical); used in 百 (hundred); also 万 (ten thousand), 夏 (summer)
业: bottom of 並 (row), which was two people standing together, 立立 (stand up) fused; also 業 (business), 湿 (damp), 虚 (void), 霊 (spirits)
丷: upside-down 八 (eight); used in 前 (in front); also 弟 (younger brother), 送 (escort), 着 (don), 平 (even)
俞: sound component of 輸 (transport); also in 諭 (rebuke), 癒 (healing), 愉 (pleasure)
兑: sound component of 説 (opinion); also in 税 (tax), 鋭 (pointed), 脱 (undress), 悦 (ecstasy)
堇: a person burned as a sacrifice for rain; used in 勤 (diligence); also 謹 (discreet), 僅 (a wee bit)
壴: drum with base and feathers on top; used in 喜 (rejoice); also 樹 (timber), 鼓 (drum)
夋: today a sound component in Japanese; used in 酸 (acid); also 俊 (genius), 唆 (tempt), 駿 (a good horse)
龷: originally written with 巛 (curving river radical (no.47)) and 一 (one); used in 昔 (once upon a time); also 共 (together), 散 (scatter), 展 (unfold)
龸: top component of 学 (study) (with katakana TSU) and 堂 (public chamber) (with ⺌); also in 労 (labor), 栄 (flourish), 覚 (memorize), 営 (camp)
龹: component of 勝 (victory); also in 巻 (scroll), 券 (ticket), 藤 (wisteria), 拳 (fist)
𠂉: top variant of ｲ and 人 (person); used in 年 (year); also 毎 (every), 海 (sea), 旅 (trip), 族 (tribe)
𠃌: outer component of 司 (director), a bent hook; also in 幻 (phantasm)
𠆢: top variant of 人 (person); used in 茶 (tea); also 谷 (valley), 全 (whole), 輪 (wheel), 余 (too much), 論 (argument)
𠦝: variant of 卓 (eminent); used in 幹 (tree trunk); also 潮 (tide), 乾 (drought), 韓 (Korea)
𠮛: inner component of 司 (director); also in 獣 (animal)
𡗗: top component of 春 (springtime) where it's two hands holding an instrument; also 寒 (cold), 実 (reality), 棒 (rod), 奏 (play music)
𦰩: historical and more conservative variant of 堇 (burned human sacrifice for rain); component of 漢 (Sino-); also 難 (difficult), 嘆 (sigh)
𧘇: lower half of 衣 (garment); used in 表 (surface); also 展 (unfold), 裏 (back), 褒 (praise), 猿 (monkey)
𠫓: upside-down 子 (child); used in 育 (bring up); also 流 (current), 徹 (penetrate), 撤 (remove), 棄 (abandon), 硫 (sulphur)
𭕄: katakana TSU form of ⺌, itself a component form of 小 (little); used in 挙 (raise); also 巣 (nest), 桜 (cherry), 脳 (brain), 厳 (stern)
